system.powerDescription:
Select one mundane object of up to CAT size within range, for the duration of this power you may manifest exact duplicates of the selected object upon any flat, empty surface within range. You may determine the orientation of any manifested objects. 

You may manifest enough total duplicates to fill CAT area. Gain or grant +1D when you or an ally next take advantage of this power. This power may change the parameters of rolls whilst active.
